title: Establish Tower operating conventions for rollout
objective: Determine the repo-specific conventions Tower should assume for Git workflow, Builder avoid-paths, and Scribe canonical docs so the Control Tower bootstrap can be checked in with explicit operating guidance.
instructions: Inspect the repository structure, existing docs harness, agent contracts, and current untracked Tower bootstrap files.
Recommend concrete answers for the three standing open questions: Git-master workflow, Builder avoid-paths, and Scribe canonical conventions.
Identify any risks or gaps that should be called out before checking in the Tower bootstrap.
constraints: Ground findings in repo state, not generic preferences.
expected_outputs: ResultPacket with recommended conventions, supporting evidence, and rollout risks.
definition_of_done: All three open questions have concrete recommended answers.
Any check-in risks for the Tower bootstrap are explicit.
